bead.title: control-databases: POST/DELETE /control/tenants/{id}/databases
bead.description:
Tenant-scoped database CRUD on the control plane. Extends C1's authz pattern and wires to the tenant_databases table from A1. Legacy /control/tenants CRUD stays untouched.

## Scope

### 1. Routes (extend control_plane_routes.rs)

    .route("/tenants/:id/databases", get(list_tenant_databases))
    .route("/tenants/:id/databases", post(create_tenant_database))
    .route("/tenants/:id/databases/:name", delete(delete_tenant_database))

Handlers:

- list_tenant_databases — require_tenant_admin (from C1 control_plane_authz) OR require_deployment_admin; return JSON array from storage.list_tenant_databases(tenant_id).

- create_tenant_database — require_tenant_admin or deployment_admin. Body: { name: "orders" }. Validate name per the D1 identifier rule (1-63 ASCII, no leading digit, [a-zA-Z0-9_-]). Reject duplicates within tenant with 409 Conflict. Return 201 + the new row on success.

- delete_tenant_database — require_tenant_admin or deployment_admin. Delete the tenant_databases row for (tenant_id, name). Return 204 on success, 404 if not found. Does NOT cascade-delete actual stored data (that's a later bead); just removes the registration.

### 2. Storage adapter trait methods (adapter.rs)

    fn list_tenant_databases(
        &self,
        tenant_id: TenantId,
    ) -> Result<Vec<TenantDatabase>, AxonError> {
        Ok(vec![])
    }

    fn create_tenant_database(
        &self,
        tenant_id: TenantId,
        name: &str,
    ) -> Result<TenantDatabase, AxonError> {
        Err(AxonError::Internal("create_tenant_database not supported by this adapter".into()))
    }

    fn delete_tenant_database(
        &self,
        tenant_id: TenantId,
        name: &str,
    ) -> Result<bool, AxonError> {
        Ok(false)
    }

Add a small `TenantDatabase` struct to axon-core (or axon-storage) with `{ tenant_id, name, created_at_ms }`. Check axon-core/src/auth.rs first — if there is a near-equivalent already, use it. Otherwise add to axon-core/src/auth.rs alongside TenantMember.

Implement on memory/sqlite/postgres. SQL uses the existing tenant_databases table (PK tenant_id, name). INSERT with ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, name) DO NOTHING and return-the-result pattern; DELETE returns affected row count; SELECT for list.

### 3. Integration tests: crates/axon-server/tests/control_databases_test.rs (NEW)

- admin_can_create_database — deployment admin creates a database in a tenant; 201 + row present in GET.
- non_admin_cannot_create_database — non-admin JWT, 403.
- create_duplicate_returns_409 — two create calls for same (tenant, name), second returns 409.
- delete_removes_row — create then delete; GET shows empty.
- delete_missing_returns_404 — delete a never-created database; 404.
- two_tenants_same_database_name — verify (tenant_a, "orders") and (tenant_b, "orders") coexist (different rows, different tenants).
- invalid_database_name_rejected — names violating the D1 identifier rule return 400.

### Context

- A1 schema already has tenant_databases (tenant_id, name, created_at_ms) with PK (tenant_id, name)
- C1 landed control_plane_authz require_tenant_admin/deployment_admin — reuse
- D1 landed the identifier validation rule — reuse/inline its regex or small helper
- B1's JWT middleware already runs on /control if the caller sends a token
- Legacy /control/tenants CRUD stays untouched

## Files to touch

- crates/axon-core/src/auth.rs — add TenantDatabase if not already present
- crates/axon-storage/src/adapter.rs — 3 new trait methods
- crates/axon-storage/src/memory.rs — impl
- crates/axon-storage/src/sqlite.rs — impl
- crates/axon-storage/src/postgres.rs — impl
- crates/axon-server/src/control_plane_routes.rs — add routes + handlers
- crates/axon-server/tests/control_databases_test.rs — NEW

## Files NOT to touch

- crates/axon-server/src/control_plane.rs — legacy CRUD
- crates/axon-server/src/auth.rs — legacy Tailscale

## Verification

- cargo test -p axon-server --test control_databases_test (must pass 7 tests)
- cargo test --workspace (all prior tests green — additive)
- cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings clean
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] Three new /control/tenants/:id/databases routes (GET, POST, DELETE)
- [ ] Handlers gated by require_tenant_admin or require_deployment_admin
- [ ] TenantDatabase struct in axon-core if not already present
- [ ] StorageAdapter: list_tenant_databases, create_tenant_database, delete_tenant_database
- [ ] All 3 backends implement
- [ ] control_databases_test.rs with 7 integration tests
- [ ] Invalid identifiers return 400
- [ ] Duplicate create returns 409
- [ ] Two tenants with same database name coexist
- [ ] cargo test --workspace green
- [ ] cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings clean
- [ ] Legacy /control/tenants CRUD untouched
